race.description: Kia Ora Bloodlines To Headlines Hcp
race.comment: LORD HORATIO (2) put away a handy field on debut with a solid victory over 1000m at Warwick Farm. That form has since been franked and kept up to the mark with a 740m trial win at Warwick Farm. Gets his chance again from the draw. WHY SO HARD (7) imposing All Too Hard gelding from Lonyx on debut for the Hawkes' yard. Latest trial win over 900m at Rosehill had merit and shapes as a genuine top-three contender. RUMDABAR (6) Castelvecchio colt from a Magnus mare on debut for the Lees' stable. Impressed in all his trials and well placed with the claim. SEEIAYE (1) has won a trial since the fresh attempt in the Dalrello. Expect big improvement.
